description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a large wooden deck that wraps around the front and side of the building. The facade is dominated by floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, dining, and living areas, and a minimalist design aesthetic. The exterior walls are finished in white, contrasting with the warm wood tones of the deck. Adjacent to the bungalow is a freeform swimming pool with a stone border, enhancing the recreational appeal of the property. The property is surrounded by a white railing, and several lounge chairs are placed on the deck for relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, and a large wooden deck, accompanied by a freeform swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-plan interior, large glass windows, wooden deck, and pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the deck, glass facade, and pool positioned to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and doors, showing the pool directly behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with deck, lounge chairs, and pool to the right, emphasizing the building's depth.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front-facing windows
